chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜马斯克旗下SpaceX启动史上最大规模IPO计划；全国首张综合性司机服务地图上线；海关总署在粤发布《海关支持粤港澳大湾区建设若干措施》
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

SpaceX据悉计划五年内实现每年1万次发射

据美国联邦航空管理局（FAA）局长周三透露，SpaceX正抛出一个宏大的计划，即在五年内实现每年10000次发射。但该机构对此表示，在批准此类扩张计划之前，政府官员需要看到其可靠性有所提升。今年1月，SpaceX公司还曾表示，其计划发射并组建一个由100万个卫星组成的星座，这些卫星将环绕地球运行，并利用太阳为人工智能数据中心供电。（财联社）

阿里股东信释放信号，即时零售已成为淘宝天猫核心战略支

chinese_news.title: 新石器NewClaw：AI一体化解决方案，零门槛当无人车指挥官| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
管理一千台无人车需要多少人？答案是：一个人，一部手机，一句话。当自动驾驶逐渐“平权”，真正的瓶颈从技术转向了规模化运营。

新石器用七年时间走完从合规落地、规模量产到万台运营的三级跳，如今推出AI Agent“Neo Claw”——让用户像聊天一样指挥车队，把单人管理效率从10台拉升到100台以上。颉晶华强调，AI的价值不在于写多少代码，而在于解放双手——让无人车管理从“专业操作”变成“说话就行”。

chinese_news.title: 业绩快报 | 唯品会一季度净营收266亿元，SVIP用户贡献超50%线上销售额
chinese_news.summary:
5月21日美股盘前，唯品会发布2025年第一季度财报。一季度内，唯品会实现净营收266亿元（人民币，下同），Non-GAAP净利润23亿元。

观察核心运营数据，一季度其实现商品交易总额（GMV）569亿元，同比增长8.6%，订单量1.73亿单，同比增长3.2%。同时，平台于该季度活跃用户数为4170万，同比实现正增长。

在春节期间穿戴和年货需求集中释放、透支后续消费力的季节性特点下，相较于行业整体节奏，唯品会在交易规模与订单量增速上保持韧性，体现出其在货品供给、用户运营上的核心竞争力。

在货品供给端，一季度唯品会持续挖掘重点客群消费特点并扩充优质供给。“限时狂秒”栏目引入雅诗兰黛、珀莱雅等品牌的明星单品，有效激发用户购买意愿，推动栏目业绩实现同比显著增长，并带动用户回访率提升。

同时，平台结合专业运动、休闲健身、户外踏青等多元场景，与萨洛蒙、安踏、李宁、伯希和、凯乐石等知名品牌深化合作，充分对标时下消费者日益增长的户外运动需求。

顺应一季度踏青时节与清明小长假等带动的户外休闲消费热潮，今年3

chinese_news.title: 从概念到产线一：AI在工业制造领域的深水区探索| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
AI在工业制造领域，不是“锦上添花”的辅助工具，而是“重新设计工厂”的核心引擎。从AOI报废板的秒级识别，到刀具参数的动态优化，再到打通设计、生产、供应链的全链路智能——这场对话告诉我们，每1%的效率提升都是真金白银，AI的价值不是叠加功能，而是把“人等货”变成“货等人”。

演讲拆解了AI从概念到产线的落地路径：用自动化中台打通全链路协同，让AI在研发设计、工程预测、供应链管理、生产执行四个领域实现可量化的提效。针对不同制造业企业，给出分层方案。AI不是在某个环节帮你做得更好，而是从原生流程开始，重新定义制造业的生产力基准。

以下为嘉立创云ERP负责人 杨超 演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 城市级AI服务：从试点到常态化，机器人的实景作战与规模化落地| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
当Robotaxi还在为L4苦苦挣扎时，酷哇的环卫机器人、无人小巴、机器狗已经在50多个城市“上岗”赚钱了。

具身智能最大的瓶颈不是算法，而是数据——没有量产就没有数据，没有数据就无法进化。酷哇的解法是“以战养战”：让机器人在真实运营中一边干活一边成长，用万台规模反哺模型迭代。李柯宏强调，中国是全球少有的支持机器人规模化应用的市场，酷哇正依托“一带一路”先行布点，用真实的运营数据驱动具身智能的持续进化。

以下为酷哇科技联合创始人、COO 李柯宏 演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 36氪x PureblueAI清蓝战略合作启动仪式暨《2026消费品牌AI推荐力名册》发布 | 2026 AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary: 5月19日，2026北京亦庄AI+产业大会上，36氪与PureblueAI清蓝正式达成战略合作，并联合发布《2026消费品牌AI推荐力名册》。随着AI逐渐成为新的信息入口和消费决策入口，品牌在AI回答中是否被提及、是否被推荐、排序是否靠前，正在成为新的竞争维度。36氪副总裁迟涵表示，36氪是最早发现和报道GEO的媒体，PureblueAI清蓝在自研技术算法和“科学GEO”方法论上的积累令其成为可信的合作伙伴。PureblueAI清蓝市场副总裁李铭则用“最敏锐的商业洞察和最硬核的AI营销技术的融合”来形容此次合作，并透露该名册将分期、分行业持续发布，为品牌在AI时代提供“AI语境下的体检报告和风向标”。

chinese_news.title: 把确定性，写进农业：四个外行、两次失败、三千万学费换来的答案| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
两次失败、三千万学费——创业没有爽剧剧本，这是陆渔科技深耕农业AI真实的“入场券”。当99%的人还在用AI写文案、做设计时，有人把它扔进了鱼塘，只为解决一个最朴素的问题：不确定性。

鲁敏用18年IT男转型“新农民”的经历，揭开了水产养殖最残酷的真相：1.38万亿的市场，数字化渗透率不足5%，一叶方塘，百万归零。这场分享没有宏大叙事，只有从黑箱到白盒、从赌运气到算数据的血泪教训：农业要的不是快，是确定性。

以下为陆渔科技联合创始人、首席技术官 鲁敏 演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 从算力到价值：AI时代的基础设施重构与产业增长新引擎| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
token经济如何重塑AI产业链？从芯片到智算中心，从模型服务到终端应用，token正在成为贯穿全链的计价单位。而当推理算力需求超越训练，智算中心的角色正从算力仓库变为token工厂，一个万亿级市场的大门刚刚打开。

token正在成为AI时代的新质生产力单位。宋琛指出，随着Agent成为新交互入口，单次任务token消耗已从几千飙升至百万级别，而中国token调用量已占全球61%。在这一趋势下，AI基础设施的竞争焦点正在从“谁的模型参数更大”转向“谁能以更低成本支撑海量token流转”。英博数科的定位正是“token工厂”的全栈构建者——不做模型，不卖应用，而是提供从规划设计到软硬一体交付的智算中心一站式解决方案。

以下为演讲内容全文，经36氪整理编辑：

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX complete its IPO on Nasdaq before 2026-12-31?

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC long-term holder supply near record highs, breaking multi-year downtrend; analysts call for 5%+ near-term move; SpaceX/macro uncertainty creating volatility window.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk Bitcoin LTH supply + Cointelegraph bullish technical analysis

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Nvidia's China AI chip revenue drop below 5% of total revenue by 2026-Q4?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Spotify stock outperform SPY by >10% between now and 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: First investor day in 4 years signals confidence; new co-CEO structure (Söderström, Norström) under test; guidance pop suggests repricing floor.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Spotify investor day pop + guidance announcement

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran escalated uranium enrichment claims and Strait of Hormuz control assertion; 3%+ oil jump today on Iran statement signals geopolitical risk premium.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Iran uranium claim + BBC Iran Strait of Hormuz control map

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. government quantum computing grants to 9 firms exceed $2 billion in total value by 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Department of Energy or NIST official grant announcement; sum of all award amounts
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Quantum stocks surged on reported $2B 'award' plan, but market hasn't priced binary: actual disbursement vs. announcement. Political risk (funding delays, rescission) underweighted.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC quantum stocks soar on U.S. $2B award report; no formal budget line yet confirmed

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Blockchain.com's U.S. IPO price its shares above $20 per share by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC EDGAR S-1 filing, confirmed IPO price from underwriter disclosures or stock exchange opening price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Blockchain.com IPO filing is live signal; crypto sentiment risk, regulatory uncertainty on prediction markets (CoinDesk reports Congress wanting ban), and competition from MoonPay/Variational all under-reflected in early betting.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk Blockchain.com SEC IPO filing + concurrent crypto prediction market regulation concerns

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Iran's claimed control over the Strait of Hormuz trigger a U.S. military response or formal blockade warning before 2026-08-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Department of State official statement, Pentagon press release, or CENTCOM public communication explicitly referencing Iran's Strait claim
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: BBC map assertion is unprecedentedly explicit; oil market reacted +3% but geopolitical risk premium in oil futures and derivatives is still shallow given escalation pace.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC Iran Strait of Hormuz control map + CNBC oil +3% on Iran uranium statement

market_questions_to_create.question: Will ETH/BTC ratio fall below 0.04 by 2026-11-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap daily closing price for ETH/BTC pair
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Quantum computing grants and AI inference infrastructure focus (token economics as 'new quality productive force' per 36Kr) suggests BTC dominance play; Ethereum exposure to macro AI cap concentration risk. Ratio momentum weak in sideways BTC action.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr 从算力到价值 token economics reshaping AI infrastructure; CoinDesk flat BTC action masking relative weakness

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. Congress pass legislation banning prediction markets on crypto exchanges before 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. House + Senate vote count on legislation with explicit 'ban' language; passage into law via Presidential signature
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports Congress 'wants to ban' crypto prediction markets citing national security; CFTC/NHL safeguard deal suggests regulatory workaround appetite, but outright ban risk sentiment underpriced in Polymarket/Manifold operator valuations.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk crypto prediction markets national security ban + CFTC NHL deal showing regulatory pressure

investment_theses.thesis: BTC long-term holder supply breakout + SpaceX/macro uncertainty = tactically long BTC perps into next 8 weeks, targeting retest of prior technical resistance.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Bitcoin LTH supply near record, breaking multi-year downtrend
Cointelegraph: technical analysis stays bullish, 5%+ move due
CoinDesk: SpaceX IPO/Nvidia earnings capturing narrative share, reducing BTC short-covering urgency
investment_theses.counter_view: BTC flat action reflects macro caution (Fed uncertainty post-Powell comments); SpaceX IPO success could siphon retail capital from crypto into equity narratives; geopolitical shock (Iran escalation, Gaza) could trigger flight-to-safety sell.
investment_theses.expression: Buy BTC perpetual contracts (3-5x leverage) on Bybit/Deribit, target 5-7% gain over 6 weeks; hedge with 10-delta ETH puts or short ETH/BTC ratio for tail risk

investment_theses.thesis: Quantum computing equity basket (IonQ, Rigetti proxies or QMCO if available) outperforms growth indices into 2026-Q3 as U.S. $2B grant awards are formally announced.
supporting_signals: CNBC: quantum stocks soared on reported $2B U.S. government award + equity stakes to 9 firms
Implied grant disbursement timeline: announcement likely Q2/Q3 2026
investment_theses.counter_view: Budget impasses, political pressure (GOP tension over Trump ballroom/weaponization fund per CNBC) could delay or reduce quantum funding; tech sector rotation away from semiconductors/AI as macro rates spike; quantum hype cycle peaks before commercial relevance.
investment_theses.expression: Overweight quantum ETF or sector rotation into defense/aerospace contractors (RTX, NOC, LMT) as proxy; short QQQ (tech concentration risk) against long IonQ/Rigetti equity or calls

investment_theses.thesis: Iran geopolitical escalation (uranium, Strait of Hormuz claim) drives oil (WTI) and energy equity repricing; long XLE or oil futures, short equities correlated to growth slowdown.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Iran uranium statement drove WTI +3%
BBC: Iran published explicit Strait of Hormuz control map (22,000 sq km) — most assertive territorial claim in years
No U.S. military response yet → market pricing in brinkmanship window before escalation
investment_theses.counter_view: U.S. sanctions Sinaloa cartel Ethereum addresses (per Cointelegraph) — suggests Trump admin focused on domestic order rather than foreign posturing; diplomatic de-escalation via back-channel talks could deflate geopolitical premium; U.S. energy independence reduces Strait disruption impact vs. 2010s.
investment_theses.expression: Long USO or XLE; buy WTI call spreads (long 85c / short 95c, expires 2026-07-31); hedge with short IWM (small-cap domestic exposure) or long DXY to capture macro haven flows

investment_theses.thesis: Walmart guidance warning (consumer spending cuts due to gas prices) signals macro slowdown; short consumer discretionary, long staples and yields (USDC, money market protocols).
supporting_signals: BBC/Walmart: retail giant warns shoppers cutting spending as gas prices rise — demand destruction at mass-market level
Consistent with 36Kr VIP consumer data: Vipshop (唯品会) Q1 growth 8.6% GMV YoY, only 3.2% order growth → unit economics pressure
investment_theses.counter_view: Walmart warning is cyclical noise (seasonal post-holiday normalization); fiscal stimulus or rate cuts in H2 2026 could re-accelerate discretionary spend; tech mega-cap (NVDA, MSFT, TSLA) earnings beat narratives could override macro caution.
investment_theses.expression: Short XLY (Consumer Discretionary ETF); long XLP (Staples); buy USDC/Curve stablecoin farming for 8-15% yields; hedge with long QQQ calls (tech secular growth override)

investment_theses.thesis: China robotics/autonomous systems (logistics, manufacturing AI) reaching scale profitability faster than U.S. equivalents; underweight Tesla/Robotaxi hype vs. long Chinese autonomous logistics plays if tradeable (or long commodity plays benefiting Chinese infrastructure capex: copper, lithium).
supporting_signals: FLAG: 36Kr reports Kuwa (酷哇) already deployed environmental robots in 50+ cities generating revenue ('上岗赚钱') while Waymo/Tesla Robotaxi still in L4 limbo
36Kr: autonomous vehicles not constrained by algorithm but by operational data → China's willingness to scale deployment gives data moat
36Kr 陆渔科技: agriculture AI/aquaculture automation reaching certainty; water product market 1.38T yuan, <5% digitization
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese robotics hardware/software vendors (BGI, Kuwa) face U.S. export controls and chip sanctions; Tesla Full Self-Driving optionality + Nvidia dominance in autonomous inference compute still intact; regulatory risk in China (data localization, AI governance) undercuts deployment thesis.
investment_theses.expression: Long copper (HG futures, 6-12mo out) or GDXJ (junior gold/materials) as beneficiary of Chinese capex; short TSLA or buy TSLA call spreads vs. long select China ADRs (BABA, PDD) with robotics/logistics exposure if available; otherwise tactically long materials/energy on China growth thesis through 2026-12-31
